title: UI-130 — Foundation AppTopbar + UserMenu host (mounts existing language picker, static SiteCrumb slot)
prompt:
# UI-130 — Foundation AppTopbar + UserMenu host Wave: `app-shell-foundation-20260520` (00-foundation). Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`. ## Goal Implement `` and the `` host that re-mounts the existing language picker at `apps/web/app/_components/user-menu-language-picker.tsx` (external existing reference, not a dependency task). Provide a static `SiteCrumb` slot rendering only `org.name` — the live multi-site switcher lands in `14-multi-site/T-020`. ## Prototype source of truth - `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/shell.jsx:23-33` (`STopbar`). - Cross-ref: `multi-site/shell.jsx` (`MsTopbar`) — site-switch slot position. - Topbar height = 56px (UI-127 `--shell-topbar-h`). ## Files (scope) - `apps/web/components/shell/app-topbar.tsx` [create — **Server Component** that does the data fetch (`createServerSupabaseClient().auth.getUser()`, plus org name lookup) and renders the Client `` as a child] - `apps/web/components/shell/user-menu.tsx` [create — Client Component (`'use client'`) that hosts the Radix dropdown and mounts `` from apps/web/app/_components/user-menu-language-picker.tsx + a `
` Sign out button] - `apps/web/components/shell/site-crumb.tsx` [create — static `{orgName}` placeholder Client Component; receives `orgName` as prop; carries inline comment `// TODO(multi-site/14-multi-site/T-020): replace with live SiteSwitcher`] - `apps/web/components/shell/__tests__/app-topbar.test.tsx` [create] - `apps/web/components/shell/__tests__/user-menu.test.tsx` [create] - `apps/web/components/shell/__tests__/site-crumb.test.tsx` [create] - `apps/web/app/[locale]/(app)/_actions/sign-out.ts` [create — `'use server'` `signOut()` Server Action calling `supabase.auth.signOut()` and redirecting to `/${locale}/login`] - `apps/web/i18n/en.json` and `pl.json` [modify — `Topbar.searchPlaceholder`, `Topbar.signOut`, `Topbar.openUserMenu`] Do NOT modify `proxy.ts`, the existing `user-menu-language-picker.tsx`, or any T-XXX.json outside this wave. ## Contract ```tsx // app-topbar.tsx (Server Component) export async function AppTopbar({ locale }: { locale: string }): Promise ``` Server-renders: brand-mark + `` (just an `` — no behaviour) + `` + ``. ```tsx // user-menu.tsx (Client) export function UserMenu({ user, locale, languagePickerProps, signOutAction, }: UserMenuProps): JSX.Element ``` Renders a Radix `DropdownMenu` triggered by ``. All prop types come from `user-menu-language-picker.tsx` — do not redefine them; import. ## Acceptance criteria 1. `AppTopbar` is Server Component (no `'use client'`) and renders 56px height (token). 2. `UserMenu` is Client Component and mounts the existing `UserMenuLanguagePicker` unchanged. 3. `SiteCrumb` renders only `orgName` text; an inline comment + a `data-todo="multi-site-T-020"` attribute marks the slot. 4. Sign out: clicking the button calls `signOut` Server Action; on success the user is redirected to `/${locale}/login`. Test asserts the form action wiring with a mocked Server Action. 5. Keyboard: trigger has `aria-haspopup=menu`, opens with Enter/Space, closes with Escape; first item is focused on open; tested with `userEvent`. 6. axe-core reports 0 violations. 7. `pnpm --filter web test app-topbar user-menu site-crumb -- --run` passes; typecheck + lint pass. 8. Browser console clean on render (test asserts no `console.error` spy hits). ## Out of scope - Live multi-site SiteSwitcher (14-multi-site/T-020). - Search functionality (input is a static placeholder). - Role switcher button from the prototype (admin/user role picker is dev-only; not wired here). - Notification bell (none in prototype baseline). - Mounting in a layout (UI-131). - Modifying `user-menu-language-picker.tsx`. ## RED test Write the three tests first; they must fail because the components do not exist. ## Risk red lines - AppTopbar MUST be a Server Component. The language picker is `'use client'` — placing it directly inside AppTopbar would force the topbar client. Wrap it in the `` Client child. - Do not modify `user-menu-language-picker.tsx`. - Do not move the picker file. - SiteCrumb is text only; do not introduce a Radix `Select` or any dropdown here. - Do not modify `apps/web/proxy.ts`. ## Closeout (fail-closed) Provide: screenshots desktop-1280 + 1440, screenshot_or_dom_diff_artifacts vs `settings/shell.jsx:23-33` + `multi-site/shell.jsx`, visual_parity_evidence, prototype_reference, console_network_check, acceptance_criteria_status, test_commands_and_results, changed_files, git_status, deviations_from_prototype. `ui_parity_evidence_missing` blocks closeout.

prd_refs: brief §7 risks: SiteSwitcher too early, language picker is client
pipeline_inputs.description: AppTopbar Server Component + UserMenu Client child that mounts the existing apps/web/app/_components/user-menu-language-picker.tsx and the Server Action sign-out; SiteCrumb is a static orgName slot for 14-multi-site/T-020.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server Component AppTopbar fetches user + orgName, renders brand + static search input + SiteCrumb + UserMenu. UserMenu Client wraps Radix DropdownMenu; mounts UserMenuLanguagePicker from apps/web/app/_components/user-menu-language-picker.tsx unchanged. signOut Server Action under (app)/_actions/sign-out.ts. SiteCrumb is text only with TODO + data-todo attribute. Keyboard a11y + axe-core 0 violations. Do not modify user-menu-language-picker.tsx or proxy.ts.
acceptance_criteria: AppTopbar has no 'use client' directive and renders height equal to var(--shell-topbar-h)
UserMenu mounts UserMenuLanguagePicker unchanged with the existing exported props type
SiteCrumb renders orgName text only; carries // TODO(multi-site/T-020) and data-todo='multi-site-T-020'
Sign out submits the Server Action and redirects to /<locale>/login
Trigger has aria-haspopup=menu; menu opens on Enter/Space; closes on Escape; first item focused on open
axe-core 0 violations on the rendered tree
pnpm --filter web test app-topbar user-menu site-crumb -- --run passes; typecheck + lint pass
console.error spy has zero hits during component render
test_strategy: Write the three RTL specs first (RED)
pnpm --filter web test app-topbar user-menu site-crumb -- --run
risk_red_lines: AppTopbar MUST remain a Server Component
SiteCrumb is text only — no dropdown / no Select

parity_matrix.implementation: button with user initials triggering Radix menu

parity_matrix.prototype: n/a — picker is existing external component

allowed_deviations.reason: menu accessibility requires a focusable trigger; matches every later module shell
dev-only fixture in prototype; not part of production behaviour
